attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SFH.ROLE_NAME  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME           ,   
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY IAM_USER_KEY                 ,
MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY          ,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IAM_APPLICATION_KEY          ,
SFH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG    ,
SFH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD           ,
SFH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG ,
CASE WHEN SFH.STATUS = 'A' THEN 'N' 
WHEN SFH.STATUS = 'I' THEN 'Y'
END SOURCE_DELETED_FLG           ,
SFH.LVL_NUMBER IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT   ,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE           
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SF_HIER SFH 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SFH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_SALES_THEATER_HIER MT
ON MT.LEVEL06_THEATER_NAME=SFH.ERP_SEGMENT1

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=SFH.TOOL_ID

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SFH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SFH.IAM_USER_ID

WHERE 
SFH.LVL_NUMBER=6

SELECT 
SFH.ROLE_NAME  BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME           ,   
NIU.IAM_USER_KEY IAM_USER_KEY                 ,
MT.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY SALES_TERRITORY_KEY          ,
SIA.IAM_APPLICATION_KEY IAM_APPLICATION_KEY          ,
SFH.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG STANDARD_OR_EXCEPTION_FLG    ,
SFH.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE ASSIGNMENT_TYPE_CD           ,
SFH.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG EXCLUSIVE_OR_RESTRICTIVE_FLG ,
CASE WHEN SFH.STATUS = 'A' THEN 'N' 
WHEN SFH.STATUS = 'I' THEN 'Y'
END SOURCE_DELETED_FLG           ,
SFH.LVL_NUMBER IAM_LEVEL_NUM_INT   ,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'=' DML_TYPE           
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SF_HIER SFH 
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
ON (SFH.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A')

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_SALES_THEATER_HIER MT
ON MT.LEVEL01_THEATER_NAME=SFH.ERP_SEGMENT1

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
ON SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT=SFH.TOOL_ID

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
ON SFH.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME

INNER JOIN $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
ON NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT=SFH.IAM_USER_ID

WHERE 
SFH.LVL_NUMBER=1

SELECT
SIEURS.IAM_USER_ID         ,
SIEURS.ROLE_ID             ,
SIEURS.ROLE_NAME           ,
SIEURS.TOOL_ID             ,
SIEURS.DATA_STRUCT_TYPE    ,
SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER          ,
SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1        ,
SIEURS.ASSIGNMENT_TYPE     ,
SIEURS.DATA_RES_EXPT_FLAG  ,
SIEURS.EXCL_RESTR_FLAG     ,
SIEURS.RESTRICTION_FLAG    ,
SIEURS.PROXY_FLAG          ,
SIEURS.GRANTOR_UNIVERSAL_ID,
SIEURS.GRANTOR_CEC_ID      ,
SIEURS.GRANTOR_CCO_ID      ,
SIEURS.STATUS              ,
SIEURS.TR_FLAG             ,
SIEURS.LAST_ACTION         ,
SIEURS.CREATED_BY          ,
SIEURS.CREATE_DATE         ,
SIEURS.UPDATED_BY          ,
SIEURS.UPDATE_DATE         ,
SIEURS.BATCH_ID    ,
SIEURS.ACTION_CD    ,
SIEURS.CREATE_DATETIME ,
'RI'  EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_IAM_EDWTD_USR_ROLE_SF_HIER SIEURS
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.IAM_APPLICATION_CTRL  IAC
WHERE SIEURS.TOOL_ID=IAC.TOOL_ID AND IAC.STATUS ='A' )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_ROLE NIR
WHERE  SIEURS.ROLE_NAME=NIR.BK_IAM_ROLE_NAME )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SECURITYVWDB.N_IAM_USER NIU
WHERE NIU.SK_IAM_USER_ID_INT = SIEURS.IAM_USER_ID )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_IAM_APPLICATION SIA
WHERE SIEURS.TOOL_ID=SIA.SK_APPLICATION_ID_INT )
OR NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_FIN_SALES_THEATER_HIER MT_HIER
WHERE (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=1 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL01_THEATER_NAME)
OR  (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=2 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL02_THEATER_NAME)
OR  (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=3 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL03_THEATER_NAME)
OR  (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=4 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL04_THEATER_NAME)
OR  (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=5 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL05_THEATER_NAME)
OR  (SIEURS.LVL_NUMBER=6 AND SIEURS.ERP_SEGMENT1=MT_HIER.LEVEL06_THEATER_NAME)
)
